channel.title: Code For You Web Services
channel.description: Recent content on Code For You Web Services

item.title: 3D Printing
item.description:
Looking For 3D Printing in Los Angeles?

Good For You Web Services is here to help. We offer fast and high quality 3D printing in a variety of materials and colors. Whether you are a business needing a custom replacement part printed, an individual wanting the latest fidget toy off Printables, or anything in between, we have the experience and expertise to produce a 3D print for you with unparalleled quality and strength!

item.title: Frequently Asked Questions
item.description:
What is your hourly rate?

We don’t charge hourly for standard builds. You pay upfront for the predefined scope so there are no surprises!

How long does a website take?

A standard Custom 5-page site typically takes 2-4 weeks from discovery to final deployment.

Do I own my website?

Absolutely. We structure our contracts so that once the site is paid for, all code, assets, and design files are 100% yours.

item.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
item.description:
We structure our pricing so that high-quality, custom web development is accessible to all small business owners.

Handcrafted Basic

$1,500 Down

Ideal for localized service businesses that need a blazing fast, standard 5-page setup.

  • 5 Pages
  • Standard SEO
  • Mobile Optimized
  • Site Hosting & Maintenance

Handcrafted Pro

$3,000 Down

For businesses that require advanced layouts, content creation, and custom graphics.

  • 10 Pages
  • Custom Graphics
  • Advanced SEO
  • Premium Support

item.title: Who we are
item.description:
Nick Cunningham is a web developer bringing bespoke, high-quality, hand-coded websites to small businesses. We pride ourselves on creating digital experiences that are good for you, your users, and your business’s success.

Our Process

  1. Discovery: Learning about the business and exploring your goals.
  2. Design: Creating a custom look tailored to your specific user base.
  3. Development: Hand-coding the site from scratch without builders or templates.
  4. Testing: Ensuring everything works blazingly fast on all devices.
  5. Launch: Going live and supporting your business growth!
